title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and Update available
scenario: Device Home Screen displays "Software Update" and "Release Notes" buttons in status box when firmware update is available on connected headset
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the Android device.
3. Navigate to the Home screen of the app.
4. Verify that a firmware update is available for the connected headset.
5. Observe the status box located under the Battery icons on the Device Home Screen.
6. Check if the status box displays a "Software Update" button.
7. Check if the status box also displays a "Release Notes" button.
expected: The Device Home Screen status box under the Battery icons displays both a "Software Update" button and a "Release Notes" button when a firmware update is available.
